(a) The fee for inspection of a commercial motor vehicle under the program established under Section 548.201 (Commercial Motor Vehicle Inspection Program) is $50.

(b) Out of each fee for inspection of a commercial motor vehicle, $10 shall be remitted to the state under Section 548.509 (Collection of Fee During Registration) .
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 548. Inspection of Vehicles
##### § 548.504 — Inspection of Commercial Motor Vehicle

(a) The fee for inspection of a commercial motor vehicle under the program established under Section 548.201 (Commercial Motor Vehicle Inspection Program) is $50.

(b) Out of each fee for inspection of a commercial motor vehicle, $10 shall be remitted to the state under Section 548.509 (Collection of Fee During Registration) .

*Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1291 (H.B.2305), Sec. 39, eff. March 1, 2015.*
